title: Red Riding Hood (The Wolf)
summary: The wolf's sly questioning in the woods - deep, menacing voice.
prompt: "Good day, little girl," said the wolf, his eyes glinting from the shadows of the trees. "Where are you going on such a fine morning?" He bent down low, so his voice was soft and warm. "To your grandmother's, you say? And which path will you take? The one through the meadow, or the one through the deep, dark woods?"
